tasks.subject: Task 1: Add .github/workflows/security.yml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the security workflow with one push/PR/schedule secret-scan job and two schedule-only dependency-audit jobs.

**Files:**
- Create: `.github/workflows/security.yml`
- Reference only: `.github/workflows/backend.yml`, `mobile.yml`, `lefthook.yml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Triggers: push(main), pull_request (no path filter), schedule cron `0 6 * * 1`
- permissions contents:read + concurrency group
- secrets job: checkout fetch-depth 0; betterleaks v1.3.1 tarball pinned + sha256-verified; `betterleaks git --no-banner` from repo root
- backend-audit job gated to schedule; setup-go + `just audit` in backend/
- mobile-audit job gated to schedule; pinned osv-scanner + `just audit` in mobile/
- all uses: pinned to commit SHAs

**Verify:** YAML parses via python3 yaml.safe_load; `betterleaks git --no-banner` exits 0 with 'no leaks found'; `betterleaks version` is 1.3.1

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/security.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/security.yml')); print('ok')\" && betterleaks git --no-banner", "acceptanceCriteria": ["push/PR/schedule triggers", "secrets job full-history betterleaks pinned+verified", "backend-audit + mobile-audit gated to schedule run just audit", "actions pinned to SHAs"], "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-ci-secret-scan-scheduled-rescan-design.md", "betterleaksSha256": "7b241c80204538cbb210c94514dc7cdff86430938bd7d5b6e289207959530849"}
```
